title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Goa Tourism Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Goa Tourism Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Goa Tourism Holdings Services in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goa Tourism Holdings Services:
Goa Tourism Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism Holdings Services!
